analysis: The stretch started a little rough — 29 June gave you a solid 7h 8m but with over an hour awake, and the middle nights dipped into the sixes — but you clearly course-corrected because the back half of this week is genuinely impressive, four consecutive nights all clearing 7h 19m with awake time dropping right down to the 20–40 minute range. That 7h 56m on the 3rd is the standout, and the REM on that night hit 2h 34m which is a number worth being smug about. Your deep sleep has been quietly sliding though — you opened the week at 49–51 minutes and by last night it was down to 28 minutes, which is the one thing worth keeping an eye on. The wind-down stack is clearly doing something real for your overall totals and your restlessness, so whatever combination you hit on around midweek, that's the one.
